snippet.title: Chan Chun Sing on whether he is next in line to be Singapore's prime minister
snippet.description:
With DPM Heng Swee Keat having taken himself out of the running as Singapore's prime minister, his deputy, Chan Chun Sing, was asked if he was next in line.

"Now that DPM has decided to step aside as leader of the 4G, the 4G team should be given the opportunity to relook the question of succession holistically, and we will make a collective decision on who will be the next leader of the 4G in due course," Mr Chan said in response. https://cna.asia/3uvIZAq

snippet.title: Singapore leadership succession: Heng Swee Keat explains why he is stepping down as 4G team leader
snippet.description:
Singapore Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat will step aside as the leader of the fourth-generation People's Action Party (PAP) leadership team, taking himself out of running as Singapore's next prime minister, he announced on Thursday (Apr 8).

Noting that he would be in his mid-60s by the time the COVID-19 crisis is over, Mr Heng said: "While I am in good health today, it is in the best interests of the nation for someone who is younger to tackle the huge challenges ahead." https://cna.asia/3wLKhJJ

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Liverpool (0-3) | Premier League
snippet.description:
We slumped to a second consecutive defeat at the Emirates, and in truth can have few complaints about the result.

Champions Liverpool put us under pressure for most of the 90 minutes, while up front it was a frustrating evening for our forwards, who had very little to work with all game.

We held the visitors at bay for the first half, but once Diogo Jota was brought on, Liverpool moved up a gear and ran out comfortable winners.

It was a scrappy opening 15 minutes from both sides, before Liverpool slowly began to force us deeper and deeper into our own territory.

In fact we were struggling to get out of our own half at times, and the visitors really should have taken the lead when Trent Alexander-Arnold cut the ball back to the unmarked James Milner, but his first-time effort was off target.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

#arsenal #premierleague #liverpool

en-GB.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Liverpool (0-3) | Premier League
en-GB.description:
We slumped to a second consecutive defeat at the Emirates, and in truth can have few complaints about the result.

Champions Liverpool put us under pressure for most of the 90 minutes, while up front it was a frustrating evening for our forwards, who had very little to work with all game.

We held the visitors at bay for the first half, but once Diogo Jota was brought on, Liverpool moved up a gear and ran out comfortable winners.

It was a scrappy opening 15 minutes from both sides, before Liverpool slowly began to force us deeper and deeper into our own territory.

In fact we were struggling to get out of our own half at times, and the visitors really should have taken the lead when Trent Alexander-Arnold cut the ball back to the unmarked James Milner, but his first-time effort was off target.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

#arsenal #premierleague #liverpool

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItРђЎs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItРђЎs a vicious cycle.

┘ђ┘ђ┘ђ┘ђ┘ђ

Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

ТюђУ┐ЉУиЪтј╗т╣┤У┐Єт«їт╣┤СИђТаи№╝їТљЂт«ХжЄїт┐ЎТўЦуДЇТЮЦуЮђсђѓ

ућеуюЪСИЮтИЃТќЎтЂџС║єС║ЏРђюу╗бУі▒РђЮтиЦУЅ║уџёТ▒ЅТюЇжЦ░тЊЂ
УХЂуЮђТўЦУЅ▓ТГБтЦй№╝їТАЃУі▒Т╝Фт▒▒
тИдСИіУђЂС║║т«Хтј╗тЦ╣СИђуЏ┤ТЃ│тј╗уџётю░Тќ╣тЂџСйюуџёТхфС║єТхф
С║єС║єт┐хТЃ│
As a spring ritual after the new year, IРђЎve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.
-----------------------------------------------

zh-CN.description:

 сђљТЮјтГљТЪњ Liziqi сђЉ https://goo.gl/nkjpSx

Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

ТюђУ┐ЉУиЪтј╗т╣┤У┐Єт«їт╣┤СИђТаи№╝їТљЂт«ХжЄїт┐ЎТўЦуДЇТЮЦуЮђсђѓ
тЏаСИ║ТЃ│УЄфти▒тЂџтЈЉжЦ░ТІЇуЁДТЅђС╗ЦТюЅС║єУ┐ЎСИфУДєжбЉ
ућеуюЪСИЮтИЃТќЎтЂџС║єС║ЏРђюу╗бУі▒РђЮтиЦУЅ║уџёТ▒ЅТюЇжЦ░тЊЂ
УХЂуЮђТўЦУЅ▓ТГБтЦй№╝їТАЃУі▒Т╝Фт▒▒
тИдСИіУђЂС║║т«Хтј╗тЦ╣СИђуЏ┤ТЃ│тј╗уџётю░Тќ╣тЂџСйюуџёТхфС║єТхф
С║єС║єт┐хТЃ│
As a spring ritual after the new year, IРђЎve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.

snippet.title: MOFA: BBC is not trusted even in the UK
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://news.cgtn.com/news/2021-04-01/MOFA-BBC-is-not-trusted-even-in-the-UK--Z6u03TYwDu/index.html 

According to material openly available, BBC World Service is immune from any form of regulation and can produce all the disinformation it likes with legal impunity in the UK. It has caused the spread of the fake news virus not only in the UK but all over the world. BBC should try to do more just and truthful reports to tackle its credibility crisis, Chinese Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Hua Chunying said on Wednesday.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

SUBSCRIBE! http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=mancity

http://www.mancity.com
http://www.facebook.com/mancity
http://www.twitter.com/mancity
http://www.instagram.com/mancity
https://www.snapchat.com/add/mancityofficial

About the Official Man City YouTube Channel:

Here you will find all the latest videos from Manchester City, including, all Premier League goals, highlights, behind-the-scenes footage, training and much more.

Get closer to the likes of Sergio Aguero, Kevin De Bruyne, Gabriel Jesus, Raheem Sterling, Riyad Mahrez, Benjamin Mendy and the rest of Pep Guardiola's team.

snippet.title: Gun salutes planned across UK in tribute to Prince Philip @BBC News live ­Ъћ┤ BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and ­Ъћћ to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube ­ЪЉЅ https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer ­ЪЉЅ https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

Gun salutes to mark the death of the Duke of Edinburgh are due to take place later across the UK, in Gibraltar and from warships at sea.

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband of 73 years, died on Friday.

Aged 99, he was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

Follow the story ­ЪЉЅ https://bbc.in/3fYe0J5

snippet.title: Prince Harry Preparing to Return to UK for Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Harry is expected to return to the UK for his grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral.

The Duke of Sussex is making preparations to fly back from his US home, though it was unclear whether his wife, Meghan Markle, or son, Archie, would be returning with him.

It is expected the Duke will be buried in Frogmore Gardens, following a small family service at St George's Chapel in the grounds of Windsor Castle. 

#PrinceHarry #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily
tags: duke of edinburgh becomes prince philip
prince harry and william at dianas funeral

snippet.title: Highlights | Manchester City 1-2 Leeds United | Premier League
snippet.description:
Manchester City lost for only the fourth time this season as Stuart DallasРђЎ stoppage time winner ensured 10-man Leeds United stunned the Premier League leaders at the Etihad Stadium.

Dallas gave Marcelo BielsaРђЎs side the lead against the run of play when he fired a low 18-yard drive in off the post shortly before half-time, but the game appeared to swing back in CityРђЎs favour when Liam Cooper was dismissed for a reckless tackle on Gabriel Jesus in first half added time.

Pep GuardiolaРђЎs men were in total control after the break as Leeds tried to protect their lead, but Ferran Torres looked to have rescued a point when he steered Bernardo SilvaРђЎs pass into the bottom corner in the 76th minute.

City continued to pour forward in search of a winner, but were undone by a slick counter-attack when Dallas latched onto Ezgjan AlioskiРђЎs through ball and nutmegged Ederson to seal a smash and grab victory in the 91st minute.

The defeat leaves GuardiolaРђЎs men needing 11-points from our remaining six league games to be crowned champions.

snippet.title: EVERTON 1-1 CRYSTAL PALACE | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
James Rodriguez scored on his return to action to put Everton ahead against Crystal Palace, but the Blues were made to pay for missed chances as Michy Batshuayi levelled late on. The game also saw the return of Jean-Philippe Gbamin, who has been sidelined with injury for 597 days.

en-GB.title: EVERTON 1-1 CRYSTAL PALACE | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
en-GB.description:
James Rodriguez scored on his return to action to put Everton ahead against Crystal Palace, but the Blues were made to pay for missed chances as Michy Batshuayi levelled late on. The game also saw the return of Jean-Philippe Gbamin, who has been sidelined with injury for 597 days.

snippet.description:
SUBSCRIBE Ръц http://bit.ly/FollowST

A man was found stuck in a drain - with water up to his chest - at a hiking trail along the Bukit Timah Expressway near Mandai Road on Sunday (March 21). https://str.sg/J9gL

He was later pulled out by officers from the Disaster Assistance and Rescue Team using rescue ropes, said the Singapore Civil Defence Force's (SCDF).

snippet.title: Watch live: The Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, has died
snippet.description:
Buckingham Palace has announced that His Royal Highness Prince Philip has died.

The Duke was married to Queen Elizabeth II for more than 70 years and became the longest-serving consort in British history.

His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle.

snippet.title: HARI BAHHAGIA - ATTA Halilintar & AUREL Hermansyah - ( OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Listen Hari Bahhagia : 
https://lnk.to/HariBahhagiaРђІ

*
Di sela kesibukannya meyiapkan hari pernikahan, Atta Halilintar dan Aurel Hermansyah membuat kejutan dengan single terbaru mereka berjudul HARI BAHHAGIA. Lagu yang terinspirasi dari kisah perjalanan mereka mulai dari masa bahagia, hingga masa sulit tertuang dalam lagu tersebut.

 РђюAku kepengin banget menceritakan kisah cinta ini untuk Aurel. Dan kayaknya menyampaikan lewat lagu sudah pas sekali. Awalnya, ini lagu hanya dari aku untuk Aurel, bukan direncanakan untuk duet,РђЮ jelas Atta.

 Memang benar. Awal mula single ini hanyalah ungkapan perasaan bahagia dan syukur Atta, karena akan bersama Aurel dalam ikatan pernikahan. Dan ini tadinya merupakan kado rahasia yang disiapkan Atta untuk Aurel. Ketika Atta memberikan lagu itu untuk Aurel untuk di dengarkan, ia pun ingin berduet menyanyikannya bareng dengan Atta. Alhasil, lagu yang sudah jadi pun dirombak sebagai lagu duet.

*
Credit Music :
Song Producer : Atta Halilintar
Song composer : Atta Halilintar & Gibran Prio Adihutomo
Aranger : Achmad Maulana
Music & Lyric : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo
Vocal Directed by : Gibran Prio Adihutomo
Vocal Recorded at : Atta Music Studio
Vocal Audio Angineered by : Achmad Maulana
Mixed & Mastered : Achmad Maulana

Produced by : Satria Kinayungan

Gaffer by : Wan Black

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her Рђўstrength and stayРђЎ | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.Рђ» 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the РђўWidow of WindsorРђЎ.

snippet.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu РђюHampa HatikuРђЮ (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

РђюLagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,РђЮ ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

РђюSemua orang bisa menyanyikan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,РђЮ kata Lesti. 

РђюDalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,РђЮ jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

РђюKolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ,РђЮ ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

BISMILLAH CINTA (LIRIK)
TAK DAPAT LAGI KULUKIS RASA
RAMADHAN YANG INDAH KINI TLAH TIBA
BULAN PENUH BERKAH RAHMAT DARI ALLAH
MESKI DALAM SUASANA BERBEDA

COBAAN DEMI COBAAN MELANDA
KITA BERSAMA NAMUN TAK LAGI SMA
JARAK MEMISAHKAN SEMUA TLAH BERBATAS
INI UJIAN BAGI KITA

BISMILLAH CINTA
PERCAYA PADAKU PERCAYA CINTA
YAKIN KITA BISA LALUI SEMUA
SGALA COBAAN YANG DATANG MENDERA

BISMILLAH CINTA
PANJATKAN DOA PADA YANG KUASA
BERSUJUD PADANYA DENGAN AIR MATA
INSYAALLAH RAMADHAN MEMBAWA HIKMAT

id.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
id.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu РђюHampa HatikuРђЮ (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

РђюLagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,РђЮ ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

РђюSemua orang bisa menyanyikan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,РђЮ kata Lesti. 

РђюDalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,РђЮ jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

РђюKolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan РђюBismillah CintaРђЮ,РђЮ ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

YouРђЎre on the phone with your girlfriend

IРђЎm listening to the kind of music she doesnРђЎt like 
And sheРђЎll never know your story like I do 

Cause she wears short skirts, I wear t-shirts 
SheРђЎs cheer captain and IРђЎm on the bleachers 
Dreaming Рђўbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youРђЎre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IРђЎm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canРђЎt you see 
You belong with me
 You belong with me 

Walk in the streets with you in your worn out jeans 
I canРђЎt help thinking this is how it ought to be 
Laughing on a park bench thinking to myself, hey isnРђЎt this easy 

And youРђЎve got a smile that could light up this whole town 
I havenРђЎt seen it in a while since she brought you down 
You say youРђЎre fine I know you better than that 
Hey what you doing with a girl like that 

She wears high heels, I wear sneakers 
SheРђЎs cheer captain and IРђЎm on the bleachers 
Dreaming Рђўbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youРђЎre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IРђЎm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canРђЎt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 

Oh I remember you driving to my house in the middle of the night 
IРђЎm the one who makes you laugh when you know youРђЎre Рђўbout to cry 
I know your favorite songs and you tell me about your dreams 
I think I know where you belong, I think I know itРђЎs with me 

CanРђЎt you see that IРђЎm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canРђЎt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
Have you ever thought just maybe 
You belong with me 
You belong with me

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of РђўMrs Sri LankaРђЎ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning РђюMrs WorldРђЮ on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new РђюMrs Sri LankaРђЮ. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube Рќ║ http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared РђюMrs Sri Lanka 2020РђЮ during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were Рђюdeeply disturbed and sincerely regretРђЮ the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

РђўMrs WorldРђЎ arrested for grabbing crown from head of РђўMrs Sri LankaРђЎ Рќ║ https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

snippet.title: У│йждгуЏ┤ТњГ№йю уФХждгFact Check Live 2021-04-08уЏ┤ТњГС╣Юта┤HKJCждЎТИ»У│йждгТюЃт┐ФТ┤╗У░иУЇЅтю░тцюждг тЇ│та┤У▓╝тБФ AIТеАТЊгУ│йТъю Тјњжџіждг | УўІТъюТЌЦта▒ Apple Daily
snippet.description:
УиЉждгтю░ждгта┤С╗іТЎџ№╝ѕ8ТЌЦ№╝ЅСИіТ╝ћС╣Юта┤У│йС║І№╝їжаГта┤т«џТќ╝тѓЇТЎџ6ТЎѓ45тѕєжќІУиЉсђѓ

УўІТъюсђіуФХждгFact CheckсђІт▒єТЎѓуЏ┤ТњГтљёта┤У│йС║І№╝їУ«ЊждгУ┐иуїХтдѓуй«У║Фта┤тЁДуЮЄУиЉждгсђѓ

СИ╗ТїЂТюЃтѕєТъљТГцУи»С║║ждгтљёжДњТЕЪТюЃ№╝їжЁЇтљѕтљёта┤ждгтї╣У│йуИЙсђЂжФћжЄЇУ«ітїќсђЂС║║ждгтљѕСйюуГЅух▒УеѕУ│ЄТќЎ№╝їСИђУАеуЮЄТЎњ№╝їТќ╣СЙ┐тѕеждгсђѓ

сђіуФХждгFact CheckсђІС╗ітГБТќ░тбъAIТеАТЊгУ│йТъю№╝їжЏєтљёжаЁdataжђ▓УАїжЂІу«Ќ№╝їУГўтѕЦтЄ║тЊфС║ЏТў»ТЕЪТюЃждг№╝їС╗ЦтЙЌтѕєжФўСйјТјњт║Ј№╝їСИђуЏ«С║єуёХ№╝Ђ

СИ╗ТїЂС║дТюЃтЇ│та┤УДБуГћУ«ђУђЁуЋЎУеђ№╝їУѕЄУ«ђУђЁС║њтІЋС║цТхЂ№╝ЏтЈдтцќТюЃтіаТЈњжејуи┤У│йтЅЇУефтЋЈ№╝їтцДт«ХТѕќУђЁтЙъСИГтЈ»С╗ЦТљхтѕ░Тќ╣тљЉсђѓ

сђѓ

СИ╗ТїЂТюЃтѕєТъљТГцУи»С║║ждгтљёжДњТЕЪТюЃ№╝їжЁЇтљѕтљёта┤ждгтї╣У│йуИЙсђЂжФћжЄЇУ«ітїќсђЂС║║ждгтљѕСйюуГЅух▒УеѕУ│ЄТќЎ№╝їСИђУАеуЮЄТЎњ№╝їТќ╣СЙ┐тѕеждгсђѓ

snippet.title: Prince Philip has died aged 99 @BBC News live ­Ъћ┤ BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and ­Ъћћ to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube ­ЪЉЅ https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer ­ЪЉЅ https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband, has died aged 99, Buckingham Palace has announced.

The prince married Princess Elizabeth in 1947, five years before she became Queen, and was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

A statement from Buckingham Palace said: "It is with deep sorrow that Her Majesty The Queen has announced the death of her beloved husband, His Royal Highness The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh.

"His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle."

Follow the story ­ЪЉЅ https://bbc.in/3fYe0J5

Рќ║Synopsis №╝џ
In the 9th year of Wude Period of Tang Dynasty, Li Changge, the daughter of the former crown prince, accidentally escaped from the military coup in the palace. During her escape, Changge encountered the secret service agent of a grassland tribe, Ashina Sun, who was under the pseudonym of Qin Zhun. They got to know each other through a fight and their affection grew stronger. Changge smashed a conspiracy in Youzhou. However, at the same time, her identity was revealed, and she went to Shuozhou to escape capture. She hid herself beside Gongsun Heng, the governor of Shuozhou, to help him resist the invasion of the grassland forces, but she did not expect that the enemy general was Qin Zhun. Changge was shocked and distressed to discover QinРђЎs real identity. However, the situation in Yuzhou is in great danger. In order to gain time for reinforcements, Li Changge negotiated with Sun. For the sake of the overall situation, she was willing to be a prisoner and taken to the grassland. Then she accidentally learned that the Great Khan had an ulterior motive. Changge decided to temporarily put aside her personal vengeance, and risk her life to save the situation. In order to save Changge, Sun disobeyed the order of the Great Khan, but they were far apart from each other after that. After going through the arduous exile, Changge gradually understood the principle of the invincibility of the benevolent, and finally put aside her personal grievances. After discovering that the former forces of Sui Dynasty were the manipulators behind the scenes, Changge and Sun teamed up to protect the peace of Tang Dynasty and the grassland. They finally came to realize their deep affections towards each other and went to confront the crisis ahead.

Рќ║Synopsis №╝џ
In the 9th year of Wude Period of Tang Dynasty, Li Changge, the daughter of the former crown prince, accidentally escaped from the military coup in the palace. During her escape, Changge encountered the secret service agent of a grassland tribe, Ashina Sun, who was under the pseudonym of Qin Zhun. They got to know each other through a fight and their affection grew stronger. Changge smashed a conspiracy in Youzhou. However, at the same time, her identity was revealed, and she went to Shuozhou to escape capture. She hid herself beside Gongsun Heng, the governor of Shuozhou, to help him resist the invasion of the grassland forces, but she did not expect that the enemy general was Qin Zhun. Changge was shocked and distressed to discover QinРђЎs real identity. However, the situation in Yuzhou is in great danger. In order to gain time for reinforcements, Li Changge negotiated with Sun. For the sake of the overall situation, she was willing to be a prisoner and taken to the grassland. Then she accidentally learned that the Great Khan had an ulterior motive. Changge decided to temporarily put aside her personal vengeance, and risk her life to save the situation. In order to save Changge, Sun disobeyed the order of the Great Khan, but they were far apart from each other after that. After going through the arduous exile, Changge gradually understood the principle of the invincibility of the benevolent, and finally put aside her personal grievances. After discovering that the former forces of Sui Dynasty were the manipulators behind the scenes, Changge and Sun teamed up to protect the peace of Tang Dynasty and the grassland. They finally came to realize their deep affections towards each other and went to confront the crisis ahead.

snippet.title: Security Council Arria formula meeting on Myanmar
snippet.description:
On 1 February, MyanmarРђЎs military launched a coup that halted abruptly the countryРђЎs democratic transition. The military prevented the convening of the democratically elected parliament and arbitrarily detained the countryРђЎs civilian leaders, including State Counsellor Aung San Suu Kyi and President Win Myint. The reaction of the people of Myanmar has been resolute РђЊ hundreds of thousands of peaceful protesters have taken to the streets to demand that the outcome of NovemberРђЎs election is respected and to call for the reversal of the coup.

The Arria meeting provides a platform for Myanmar voices to brief the Security Council on the current situation from their perspectives and those of the people that they represent. It will be an opportunity to understand the objectives of the pro-democracy movement, including the 31 March Federal Democracy Charter and the movementРђЎs ongoing engagement with ethnic groups and religious minorities.

Рќ║Synopsis №╝џ
In the 9th year of Wude Period of Tang Dynasty, Li Changge, the daughter of the former crown prince, accidentally escaped from the military coup in the palace. During her escape, Changge encountered the secret service agent of a grassland tribe, Ashina Sun, who was under the pseudonym of Qin Zhun. They got to know each other through a fight and their affection grew stronger. Changge smashed a conspiracy in Youzhou. However, at the same time, her identity was revealed, and she went to Shuozhou to escape capture. She hid herself beside Gongsun Heng, the governor of Shuozhou, to help him resist the invasion of the grassland forces, but she did not expect that the enemy general was Qin Zhun. Changge was shocked and distressed to discover QinРђЎs real identity. However, the situation in Yuzhou is in great danger. In order to gain time for reinforcements, Li Changge negotiated with Sun. For the sake of the overall situation, she was willing to be a prisoner and taken to the grassland. Then she accidentally learned that the Great Khan had an ulterior motive. Changge decided to temporarily put aside her personal vengeance, and risk her life to save the situation. In order to save Changge, Sun disobeyed the order of the Great Khan, but they were far apart from each other after that. After going through the arduous exile, Changge gradually understood the principle of the invincibility of the benevolent, and finally put aside her personal grievances. After discovering that the former forces of Sui Dynasty were the manipulators behind the scenes, Changge and Sun teamed up to protect the peace of Tang Dynasty and the grassland. They finally came to realize their deep affections towards each other and went to confront the crisis ahead.

Рќ║Synopsis №╝џ
In the 9th year of Wude Period of Tang Dynasty, Li Changge, the daughter of the former crown prince, accidentally escaped from the military coup in the palace. During her escape, Changge encountered the secret service agent of a grassland tribe, Ashina Sun, who was under the pseudonym of Qin Zhun. They got to know each other through a fight and their affection grew stronger. Changge smashed a conspiracy in Youzhou. However, at the same time, her identity was revealed, and she went to Shuozhou to escape capture. She hid herself beside Gongsun Heng, the governor of Shuozhou, to help him resist the invasion of the grassland forces, but she did not expect that the enemy general was Qin Zhun. Changge was shocked and distressed to discover QinРђЎs real identity. However, the situation in Yuzhou is in great danger. In order to gain time for reinforcements, Li Changge negotiated with Sun. For the sake of the overall situation, she was willing to be a prisoner and taken to the grassland. Then she accidentally learned that the Great Khan had an ulterior motive. Changge decided to temporarily put aside her personal vengeance, and risk her life to save the situation. In order to save Changge, Sun disobeyed the order of the Great Khan, but they were far apart from each other after that. After going through the arduous exile, Changge gradually understood the principle of the invincibility of the benevolent, and finally put aside her personal grievances. After discovering that the former forces of Sui Dynasty were the manipulators behind the scenes, Changge and Sun teamed up to protect the peace of Tang Dynasty and the grassland. They finally came to realize their deep affections towards each other and went to confront the crisis ahead.

snippet.title: жюЄТћЮтїЌС║г№╝ЂуЙјУѕфТ»ЇтЇЌТхиУ╗ЇТ╝ћжюЄТњ╝тй▒уЅЄТЏЮтЁЅ№╝ЏТѕ░уІ╝тцќС║цтЈЇтіЕтЈ░уЂБ№╝їТї║тЈ░Т╝ИТѕљуЙјТГљтЁ▒УГў№╝Џтц«УдќтЁеуљЃСИЪтЪиуЁД№╝їт╣ЋтЙїТјеТЅІТх«уЈЙ№╝ЏуЙјтЈЃжЎбтЁЕж╗ет╝иуАгТіЌтЁ▒№╝ЏжаєУ▒љт┐ФжЂъУиїтЂюУњИуЎ╝569тёёсђљ #ТЎџжќЊТќ░УЂъРђІ сђЉ№йю#Тќ░тћљС║║жЏ╗УдќтЈ░
snippet.description:
#Тќ░тћљС║║ТЎџжќЊТќ░УЂъ #СИГтЁ▒Тѕ░уІ╝ #уЙјтюІУ╗ЇТ╝ћжюЄТћЮСИГтЁ▒
жюЄТћЮСИГтЁ▒ уЙјУѕфТ»ЇТЅЊТЊіуЙцтЇЌТхижюЄТњ╝У╗ЇТ╝ћ ТюђТќ░тй▒уЅЄТЏЮтЁЅ
СИГтЁ▒Тѕ░уІ╝тцќС║цтЈЇтіЕтЈ░уЂБ Тї║тЈ░Т╝ИТѕљуЙјТГљТќ░тЁ▒УГў
тц«УдќтЁеуљЃСИЪтЪиуЁД т╣ЋтЙїТјеТЅІТЏЮтЁЅ
тіатІњТ»ћТхиУЂќТќЄТБ«т│ХуЂФт▒▒тЎ┤уЎ╝УЄ│тЁЕУљгУІ▒т░║
жђ▒С║ћжќІТњГ УЊгСйЕтЦДУ«іУ║ФFOXтфњжФћС║║ УФЄуЙјтюІтёфтЁѕ
уќФТЃЁСИІуџёу┤љу┤ёт║ит░╝т│ХжЄЇжќІ
у┤љу┤ёТѕ┐ТЮ▒уќФТЃЁТљЇтц▒тиетцД Тѕ┐т«бућЪтГўжЏБ УЂ»жѓд13тёёУБютіЕ
жаєУ▒љт┐ФжЂъ3тЇЃтёёуЎйждгУѓАжќІуЏцУиїтЂю УњИуЎ╝569тёё
тљдТ▒║тїЌтцДтљѕСйю т║итЦѕуѕЙТ▒║УГ░т»ЕТЪЦУѕЄСИГТќ╣уџёжаЁуЏ«
у┤љу┤ёУЈ»тЪаУАЌжаГ УЈ»тЦ│жЂГУи»С║║УгЙуйхТљДУђ│тЁЅ
Т│ЋтюІуЎ╝уЈЙТГљТ┤▓ТюђтЈцУђЂ3Dтю░тюќ ТюЅ4000т╣┤ТГитЈ▓

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy РђЊ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max РђЊ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieРђІ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/РђІ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/РђІ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event РђюSpace Jam: A New Legacy,РђЮ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.РђЎs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youРђЎve never seen them before.  ItРђЎs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronРђЎs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even РђюKingРђЮ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the РђюAvengersРђЮ films, РђюHotel RwandaРђЮ), Khris Davis (РђюJudas and the Black Messiah,РђЮ TVРђЎs РђюAtlantaРђЮ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVРђЎs РђюThe Walking Dead,РђЮ РђюStar Trek: DiscoveryРђЮ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (РђюLooney Tunes CartoonsРђЮ), Eric Bauza (РђюLooney Tunes CartoonsРђЮ), and Zendaya (upcoming РђюDune,РђЮ РђюMalcolm & MarieРђЮ).

Lee (РђюGirls Trip,РђЮ РђюNight SchoolРђЮ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmРђЎs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorРђЎs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (РђюSpider-Man: HomecomingРђЮ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (РђюWonder ParkРђЮ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (РђюThe MuleРђЮ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixРђЎs РђюWhen They See UsРђЮ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming РђюEternalsРђЮ), editor Bob Ducsay (РђюGodzilla: King of the Monsters,РђЮ РђюStar Wars Episode VIII РђЊ The Last JediРђЮ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (РђюRampage,РђЮ РђюWar for the Planet of the ApesРђЮ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (РђюGreenbook,РђЮ NetflixРђЎs РђюBridgertonРђЮ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, РђюSpace Jam: A New Legacy.РђЮ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Meet Some Of The Last Papyrus Makers In Egypt Keeping A 5,000-Year-Old Craft Alive | Still Standing
snippet.description:
Papyrus paper originated in ancient Egypt. Today, just one village still makes the paper, but after a year without tourists, workers are struggling to keep their doors open.

Saied and Atef sell their products locally in Egypt.

localized.title: Meet Some Of The Last Papyrus Makers In Egypt Keeping A 5,000-Year-Old Craft Alive | Still Standing
localized.description:
Papyrus paper originated in ancient Egypt. Today, just one village still makes the paper, but after a year without tourists, workers are struggling to keep their doors open.

Saied and Atef sell their products locally in Egypt.

snippet.title: Falcon And The Winter Soldier EPISODE 4 Breakdown & Ending Explained Review | Marvel MCU Easter Eggs
snippet.description:
Falcon And The Winter Soldier EPISODE 4 Breakdown & Ending Explained Review | Marvel MCU Easter Eggs. We review, recap and explain the fourth episode of TFATWS on Disney Plus. This contains easter eggs, theories, spoilers and a breakdown of the events and behind the scenes leaks on the Marvel property. We also discuss where things could be going with Wakanda, US Agent aka John Walker, Bucky, Zemo and Sam of course The Power Broker.

#FalconAndTheWinterSoldierРђІ #Episode4 #MarvelРђІ #MCUРђІ #BreakdownРђІ #FalconРђІ #CaptainAmericaРђІ #WinterSoldierРђІ #BuckyBarnesРђІ #FlagsmasherРђІ #DisneyPlus #USAgent #Zemo #ThePowerBroker

Falcon And The Winter Soldier is the new Marvel MCU Phase 4 Disney Plus show that follows Captain America's best buddies as they take on Baron Zemo, The Flag Smashers and US Agent. We will be doing weekly breakdowns, trailer reactions, easter egg hunts and discussing the things you missed in our reviews and recaps.

If you enjoyed this video then please subscribe to the channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ?sub_confirmation=1

If You Want To Help Support The Channel So I Can Make More Videos Like This Please Donate Here:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq3hT5JPPKy87JGbDls_5BQ/join

Get some awesome Heavy Spoilers show clothes, phonecases and accessories at - https://teespring.com/en-GB/stores/deffinitions-store

*Check out our BEST new videos below*
*Godzilla Vs Kong Easter Eggs* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=abs9qnbQ1K0
*The Walking Dead Season 10 Ending Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S3GBF7IqHBA
*Invincible Episode 4 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r6JSynjpk8g
*Falcon And The Winter Soldier Episode 3 Breakdown* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mfSE64uN4uY
*Godzilla Vs Kong Ending Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WqcLtrAmwXs
*Omni-Man Explained* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=33AtqStgVl8
*Insane Details In Zack Snyder's Justice League* - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX6qforbKyI


/* ----- SOCIAL MEDIA ----- */

Follow Me On Social Media At:
https://www.facebook.com/DeffinitionMC/
https://twitter.com/heavyspoilers
https://www.instagram.com/heavyspoilers/


/* ----- VIDEO INFORMATION ----- */

0:00 Falcon And The Winter Soldier Episode 4 Intro
0:26 Captain America The First Avenger Episode 1 Easter Egg
0:44 Episode 3 Recap
1:27 X-Men Easter Egg?
1:58 Episode 4 Breakdown
15:53 Episode 4 Reaction And Review
18:11 Episode 5 Big Character Cameo News

After a thrilling season we're finally getting all of the pieces falling into place and there's a lot of plot theories, easter eggs and things you missed that we're gonna be talking about in this video.

Before that though I just wanna point out an easter egg I got sent by Logan Kelly 13 on instagram who pointed out that in the museum in episode 1 we see a photo of Steve holding the Taxi door with the star on it. If we jump back to Captain America The First Avenger we can actually see the person who took this photo standing in the crowd showing that (it's alllll connected)

It's all connected.

Last week saw Sam and Bucky freeing Zemo in order to track down the origins of the brand new and improved Super Soldier Serum and this led them to Madripoor. After learning it was the Power Broker all along they were reunited with Sharon Carter who seemed more suspicious than Tom Holland trying to keep a secret.

We also got a small clip of Zemo busting out dance moves that would make Star Lord and Justin Hammer evacuate the Dance floor.

Earlier in the week The actor behind him Daniel Bruhl revealed that he actually did a longer dance but that Marvel cut it down and after fans united together and got #ReleaseTheZemoCut trending they dropped an hour long version of it last night.

I sat through the entire thing seventy five times, I don't give a f***

There was also a road sign on the embassy that a lot of people commented saying was a nod to the X-men and I actually drove around throughout the week looking for this on the road. I got the wife to take a photo of it and as you can see...it clearly confirms that the X-men exist in the Heavy Spoilers universe too.

We ended with a cliffhanger and saw that Ayo had been sent from Wakanda to bring Zemo in. Before you could say 'Wakanda sh*t is this) we cut to black...panther's music.

0:00 Falcon And The Winter Soldier Episode 4 Intro
0:26 Captain America The First Avenger Episode 1 Easter Egg
0:44 Episode 3 Recap
1:27 X-Men Easter Egg?
1:58 Episode 4 Breakdown
15:53 Episode 4 Reaction And Review
18:11 Episode 5 Big Character Cameo News

After a thrilling season we're finally getting all of the pieces falling into place and there's a lot of plot theories, easter eggs and things you missed that we're gonna be talking about in this video.

Before that though I just wanna point out an easter egg I got sent by Logan Kelly 13 on instagram who pointed out that in the museum in episode 1 we see a photo of Steve holding the Taxi door with the star on it. If we jump back to Captain America The First Avenger we can actually see the person who took this photo standing in the crowd showing that (it's alllll connected)

It's all connected.

Last week saw Sam and Bucky freeing Zemo in order to track down the origins of the brand new and improved Super Soldier Serum and this led them to Madripoor. After learning it was the Power Broker all along they were reunited with Sharon Carter who seemed more suspicious than Tom Holland trying to keep a secret.

We also got a small clip of Zemo busting out dance moves that would make Star Lord and Justin Hammer evacuate the Dance floor.

Earlier in the week The actor behind him Daniel Bruhl revealed that he actually did a longer dance but that Marvel cut it down and after fans united together and got #ReleaseTheZemoCut trending they dropped an hour long version of it last night.

I sat through the entire thing seventy five times, I don't give a f***

There was also a road sign on the embassy that a lot of people commented saying was a nod to the X-men and I actually drove around throughout the week looking for this on the road. I got the wife to take a photo of it and as you can see...it clearly confirms that the X-men exist in the Heavy Spoilers universe too.

We ended with a cliffhanger and saw that Ayo had been sent from Wakanda to bring Zemo in. Before you could say 'Wakanda sh*t is this) we cut to black...panther's music.

snippet.title: Siti Nurhaliza Hadiahkan Lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU Buat Ernie Zakri & Syamel Walaupun Tengah Sarat
snippet.description:
Majlis resepsi Ernie Zakri dan Syamel sememangnya meriah dengan kehadiran rakan artis dan juga para peminat masing-masing yang sama-sama meraikan hari istimewa pasangan ini.

Selain daripada majlis yang sederhana namun terlihat eksklusif itu, kehadiran penyanyi nombor satu negera, Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang sudah sarat hamil anak kedua juga cukup membuatkan ramai РђўhisteriaРђЎ.

Beliau yang hadir bersama suami tercinta, Datuk Seri Khalid Mohd Jiwa dilihat mengenakan busana bewarna merah jambu telah berdiri dan spontan menyanyikan lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU hadiah buat pasangan pengantin. 

Walaupun usia kandungan sudah menghampiri sembilan bulan, suara Tok Ti masih lagi power dan mendapat sorakan daripada semua yang hadir.

Dapat dilihat wajah gembira pasangan Ernie Zakri dan Syamel yang begitu teruja РђўdihadiahkanРђЎ dendangan lagu yang cukup istimewa buat penyanyi kesayangan ramai itu.

Menerusi media sosial, baik di Twitter ataupun di TikTok, kesemuanya memuji penampilan Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang begitu humble dan masih power menyampaikan lagu walaupun sedang sarat hamil anak kedua. #SITINURHALIZA #SYAMELERNIE

snippet.description:

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico Рђћ go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz Рђћ this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful Рђћ please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive Рђћ https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive Рђћ https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster Рђћ https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon Рђћ https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. Рђћ https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton Рђћ https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

snippet.title: ­Ъћ┤ [Live in HD] ONE On TNT I
snippet.description:
The biggest month in ONE Championship history begins on Thursday, 8 April, as ONE on TNT I airs LIVE right here on YouTube at 8:30 a.m. SGT (some regions excluded).

In the main event, reigning ONE Flyweight World Champion Adriano Moraes defends his belt against all-time great Demetrious Johnson in the biggest flyweight mixed martial arts fight in history! 

In the co-main event, American legend Eddie Alvarez takes on dangerous #2-ranked contender Iuri Lapicus in a pivotal lightweight mixed martial arts showdown!

They are joined on this stacked card by Muay Thai superstar Rodtang Jitmuangnon, Senegalese wrestling sensation "Reug Reug," American warrior Tyler McGuire, and more!

MAIN CARD:

Catchweight Muay Thai (61.5kg)
Rodtang Jitmuangnon vs. Danial Williams

Flyweight World Championship
Adriano Moraes vs. Demetrious Johnson
 
Lightweight Mixed Martial Arts
Eddie Alvarez vs. Iuri Lapicus

LEAD CARD:

Welterweight Mixed Martial Arts
Tyler McGuire vs. Raimond Magomedaliev

Featherweight Kickboxing
Enriko Kehl vs. Chingiz Allazov

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Reug Reug vs. Patrick Schmid

Watch ONE on TNT I LIVE on 7 April:
10pm ET/10pm PT on TNT
10pm ET/7pm PT on TNT app
8:30pm ET/5:30pm PT on @Bleacher Report Live   
Check your local listings: http://bit.ly/HowToWatchONEonTNT

#ONEonTNT #ONEChampionship

snippet.description:
жђИуЦЦУЂќуХЊтцДТѕ░УќћУќћУх░т««т╗ЪУдќУДњ+ТЃАжЮѕжејтБФт▒ђ
уІ╝жџіжЁЇуй«№╝џТЃАжЮѕжејтБФ+уІ╝ујІ+т░ЈуІ╝
уЦъжџіжЁЇуй«№╝џжаљ+тЦ│+уЇх+жеј
Рђ╗тЦ│тиФтЁеуеІСИЇтЈ»С╗ЦУЄфТЋЉ
Рђ╗ТГцТЮ┐тГљС┐«Тћ╣УдЈтЅЄ№╝џуІ╝ујІтЈ»С╗ЦУЄфуѕєтИХС║║сђѓ

теЏуЎЙуЅѕТЃАжЮѕжејтБФУдЈтЅЄ№╝џ
1.ТЃАжЮѕжејтБФТЊЂТюЅсђїСИђТгАсђЇтЈЇтѓиТіђУЃй-тюетцюТЎџСИГУбФжаљУеђт«ХТЪЦжЕЌсђЂУбФтЦ│тиФСИІТ»њ№╝їтЅЄУЕ▓уЦъУЂиТиўТ▒░сђѓ
2.ТЃАжЮѕжејтБФт░ЄТ░ИжЂаСИЇТюЃТГ╗Тќ╝тцюТЎџсђѓ
3.УІЦтцюТЎџСИГтЦ│тиФУѕЄжаљУеђт«ХтљїТ»њтљїжЕЌТЃАжЮѕжејтБФ№╝їтЅЄТў»тЦ│тиФТиўТ▒░(тЏатцюТЎџжаєт║Јуѓ║тЦ│тиФтюетЁѕ)сђѓ
4.уЇхС║║УІЦТГ╗Тќ╝тцюТЎџ№╝їжќІТДЇтѕ░ТЃАжЮѕжејтБФ№╝їт░ЄуёАТ│ЋтИХУх░ТЃАжЮѕжејтБФ№╝їСйєУІЦуЇхС║║тюеуЎйтцЕтЄ║т▒ђтЅЄтЈ»тИХУх░ТЃАжЮѕжејтБФсђѓ
5.жејтБФуЎйтцЕжЕЌУГЅТЃАжЮѕжејтБФУ║Фтѕє№╝їтЈ»ТѕљтіЪт░ЄТЃАжЮѕжејтБФТиўТ▒░№╝їСИЇТюЃУбФтЈЇтѓитй▒жЪ┐сђѓ
6.ТЃАжЮѕжејтБФСИЇУЃйУЄфуѕє№╝їСИЇУЃйУЄфтѕђсђѓ
7.жЂ║УеђТ»ћуЁДтЁѕтЅЇУдЈтЅЄ№╝їТЎџСИіТГ╗уџётЈфТюЅуггСИђТЎџТиўТ▒░УђЁуџёТюЅжЂ║Уеђсђѓ

snippet.description:
#TNElection2021 #Tamilnaduelection2021
TN Election 2021 Playlist : https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLuUWy6NQLoCUFuOLQumgzmS3Bgvy4WeCT

The Tamil Nadu Assembly elections ended peacefully on Tuesday and the voter turnout stood at 71.79 per cent with people sealing the fate of nearly 4,000 candidates including that of AIADMK''s K Palaniswami and DMK chief M K Stalin, the key contenders for power.

In 2016, Tamil Nadu witnessed 74.26 per cent voter turnout and polls were held for 232 constituencies out of the total 234 that year and polls for two seats were held later.In this video host Se.Tha Elangovan talks Tamil Nadu Assembly elections polling percentage statistics



CREDITS
Host -Se.Tha Elangovan  | Script - Se.Tha Elangovan,Liyana | Camera - Kannan | Edit -Ajith

Attack on Titan focuses on the story of Armin Arlert, Mikasa Ackerman, and Eren Jaeger battling against the mighty Titans of their world.

The story begins in 845 after the fall of Wall Maria and Titans started eating humans within the Shiganshina District. This pushed humanity back behind the second Wall, Wall Rose. Only Wall Rose and Wall Sina were left to stop the Titans.

snippet.title: How Mercedes-Benz Is Losing Its Prestige Image
snippet.description:
Mercedes-Benz is perhaps the biggest name in luxury cars globally, and for countless buyers around the world, it is a car brand to aspire to own. The German automaker has a reputation for superb build quality, excellent engineering, and the bragging rights that its founder Carl Benz invented the first production automobile. 

Today, Mercedes-Benz faces a new class of challenges as Tesla has become the aspirational brand for younger consumers. There is a slew of other EV hopefuls vying for the next generationРђЎs aspirational vehicleРђЎs mantle. Automakers have had to sink billions into new technologies and contend with a new crop of competitors in the critical Chinese market and around the world.

snippet.title: $100 South Indian Food - GIANT 19 ITEMS THALI | Chettinad (Tamil Nadu) Crab Curry!
snippet.description:
­ЪјЦ Golden Crab Yolk - Thai Seafood Meal: https://youtu.be/T_5ctDxhhXM
­ЪЊЇ Sri Ananda Bhawan Bangkok: https://g.page/srianandabhawanbkk?share
­ЪЉЋ T-shirts and caps available now: https://migrationology.com/store/

BANGKOK, THAILAND - Welcome to Sri Ananda Bhawan, one of the best South Indian food restaurants in Bangkok that specializes in food from Chettinad in Tamil Nadu, South India. Today, weРђЎre going to eat the giant 3,000 THB (around $100) banana leaf thali, that includes 19 different dishes! #IndianFood #Bangkok #Thailand

Chettinad is within the Tamil Nadu state of South India. The food is characterized by lots of chili powder, pepper, and curry leaves. When I heard about the massive 19 item thali, there was no way I could resist. Thanks to Sri Ananda Bhawan and Mr. Rachan, for allowing me to see inside the kitchen as the talented ChefРђЎs prepared all 19 dishes. One of their most well known dishes is the Chettinad crab curry. Onions, tomatoes, garlic, curry leaves, chili powder, pepper, coriander, all tempered down, loaded with crab, Chettinad masala, and coconut milk. The result was something truly spectacular, a combination of spices and ingredients that any curry lover will fall in love with.

Along with the Chettinad crab curry there was chicken 65, fish 65, prawn 65, about three other prawn dishes, 2 mutton dishes, fish masala, tandoori fish, a variety of veg dishes, chicken curries, sambar, and rasam. All laid out on a banana leaf with rice, it was truly a special meal!

I would also mention that although I ordered the massive 19 item thali, which you have to actually pre-order (and I would highly recommend). You can additionally just walk in, and they have many other more simple thalis that you can order - including vegetarian, or just order single dishes. Amazing South Indian food, and specifically one of the only Chettinad restaurants in Bangkok, Thailand.

­ЪЊЇ Sri Ananda Bhawan Restaurant, Bangkok: https://g.page/srianandabhawanbkk?share

Thank you very much for watching this video, and hope youРђЎre having a fantastic day!

­ЪјхMUSIC: 
https://goo.gl/HwVjdo

snippet.title: Menjelang Ramadan | Dihalau tuan rumah, Steven Sim bantu ibu anak 10
snippet.description:
Menjelang Ramadan yang dijangka bakal membuka tirai 13 April ini, pastinya ramai umat Islam mula membuat persiapan meraikan bulan penuh keberkatan dan rahmat.

Namun, keceriaan menjelang ramadan itu tidak sama bagi seorang ibu beranak 10, apabila individu dikenali sebagai Ros itu dikatakan dihalau keluar dari rumah sewa kerana dikatakan tidak mampu membayar sewa.

Namun, keceriaan menjelang ramadan itu tidak sama bagi seorang ibu beranak 10, apabila individu dikenali sebagai Ros itu dikatakan dihalau keluar dari rumah sewa kerana dikatakan tidak mampu membayar sewa.

snippet.title: У│йждгуЏ┤ТњГ№йю2021-04-05 уФХждгFact Check LiveуЏ┤ТњГтЇЂта┤HKJCждЎТИ»У│йждгТюЃТ▓Ўућ░УЇЅтю░ТЌЦждг тЇ│та┤У▓╝тБФ AIТеАТЊгУ│йТъю Тјњжџіждг РђћУўІТъюТЌЦта▒ Apple Daily
snippet.description:
жђЎтцЕ№╝ѕ5ТЌЦ№╝ЅТ▓Ўућ░ждгта┤СИіТ╝ћтЇЂта┤УЇЅтю░ТЌЦУ│й№╝їжаГта┤т«џТќ╝СИІтЇѕ1ТЎѓТГБжќІУиЉсђѓ

УўІТъюсђіуФХждгFact CheckсђІт▒єТЎѓуЏ┤ТњГтљёта┤У│йС║І№╝їУ«ЊждгУ┐иуїХтдѓуй«У║Фта┤тЁДуЮЄУиЉждгсђѓ

сђіуФХждгFact CheckсђІТЈљСЙЏAIТеАТЊгУ│йТъю№╝їжЏєтљёжаЁdataжђ▓УАїжЂІу«Ќ№╝їУГўтѕЦтЄ║тЊфС║ЏТў»ТЕЪТюЃждг№╝їС╗ЦтЙЌтѕєжФўСйјТјњт║Ј№╝їСИђуЏ«С║єуёХ№╝Ђ

СИ╗ТїЂС║дТюЃтЇ│та┤УДБуГћУ«ђУђЁуЋЎУеђ№╝їУѕЄУ«ђУђЁС║њтІЋС║цТхЂ№╝ЏтЈдтцќТюЃтіаТЈњжејуи┤У│йтЅЇУефтЋЈ№╝їтцДт«ХТѕќУђЁтЙъСИГтЈ»С╗ЦТљхтѕ░Тќ╣тљЉсђѓ

ТГцтцќ№╝їт░ЄТюЅтЄ║жќўжаљТИгУх░СйЇтюќ№╝їуГЅУДђуюЙС║єУДБС╗іта┤У│йС║ІтйбтІб№╝їжѓітЋ▓ждгтЈ»С╗ЦУ│║ТГЦжђЪ№╝ЏжѓітЋ▓ждгуЏИт░ЇУЮЋт║Ћ№╝їтІЎТ▒ѓт╣ФтцДт«ХТЇЅТЏ┤тцџтєиждгсђѓ

сђіуФХждгFact CheckсђІУеГТюЅтЈЃУ│йждгУ│аујЄУх░тІб№╝їућ▒жџћТЎџтѕ░тЇ│та┤№╝їСИђуЏ«С║єуёХ№╝ЏжЏ╗УЁджаљУеѕУЄета┤тцДТѕХУљйжБЏждг№╝їУ«ЊждгУ┐иУљйТ│етЅЇСйютЈЃУђЃ№╝їтбъТи╗тІЮу«Ќсђѓ

сђіуФХждгFact CheckсђІт░ЄТќ╝СИГтЇѕ12ТЎѓ25тѕєжќІТњГ№╝їт▒єТЎѓYoutubeтЈісђіТъюуЄЃтЈ░сђІжЃйТюЃтЁеуеІуЏ┤ТњГсђѓ

=======

сђљтеЏТеѓС║║уЅЕсђЉТЃЁжАўтИѓТ░ЉуЋЎт«ХтћћтЦйтЄ║УАЌУЂџжцљ жёДСИђтљЏтЁЕж║хУѕќтЪиугаУЮЋ200Уљг (УўІТъюТЌЦта▒ Apple Daily)  (https://youtu.be/e3agbTOdfoY)
сђљжаГТбЮтІЋТќ░УЂъсђЉтГЋтЕдУбФТІЅУиї уцЙТюЃжЌюТ│ет║дСИЇтЈіу┤░SoУѕЄуЙјТќ»сђіжаГТбЮтІЋТќ░УЂъсђІEp.6 (УўІТъюТЌЦта▒ Apple Daily) (https://youtu.be/4MaqWS-XFEc)
сђљтЂЄтдѓТ▓њТюЅтцЕтЃ╣уДЪсђЉсђїудЈжБЪсђЇСИЅУђЂсђђтћћжЮауХюТЈ┤жЮаУЄфти▒  (Тъюу▒й Apple Daily) (https://youtu.be/aUE2oQIDoV0)
сђљу▒йТЃ│ТЌЁУАїсђЉуЏ┤ТЊіТЮ▒тЇЌС║ъждќтђІС║║тдќжеитЙїтЈ░сђђУ«іТђДУѕътЈ░СИђтДљуџёТЌЦУѕЄтцю  (Тъюу▒й Apple Daily) (https://youtu.be/CBBq_D0-Lsg)
сђљжђЎтцюухдТЃАС║║тЪ║СИђт░ЂС┐АсђЉтцДСйгУїЁУ║ЅУЈ»ТЌЦтцюТђЮт┐х тЏъТєХтЙъ8ТГ▓жќІтДІ№╝џтЁёт╝ЪТюЅС╗іућЪТ▓њСЙєСИќ (тБ╣жђ▒тѕі Next) (https://youtu.be/t06qjQbRIpY)
сђљуЎїтд╗уќЉУЁФуўцтбътцДтєЇтЁЦжЎбсђЉТъЌтГљтЇџт┐ЃтіЏС║цуўЂ ТёЪТ┐ђТ▒фжў┐тДљта▒у┤ЎтїЁжїбуЏИУ┤ѕТИАжЏБжЌю№╝ѕтБ╣жђ▒тѕі Next№╝Ѕ(https://youtu.be/gk83T58fTIs)
сђљуЂБС╗ћуЄњтЉ│УђЂтГЌУЎЪсђЉ17ТГ▓тЂџтцДт╗џ УЄфуФІжќђТѕХ35т╣┤ Т▓╣жЏъжЁњтЉ│Т┐Ѓ УђЂжЌє№╝џтЦйтЂџтўЁжБЪуЅЕтћћТюЃтЦйжБЪ(жБ▓жБЪућитЦ│ Apple Daily) (https://youtu.be/svAF8pKszw0)
сђљТи▒Т░┤тЪЌтЁЕжцИжБ»сђЉ59ТГ▓тцДтЈћУ│Б$32тЁЕжцИжБ» ТюѕТ┤Й100С╗йжђЂжЋиУђЁ ућ▒тЈ░уЂБТ┤Йтѕ░ждЎТИ»№╝џтЈЌжЂјТИ»С║║ТЂЕТЃаТЃ│тЏъжЦІ (жБ▓жБЪућитЦ│ Apple Daily) (https://youtu.be/kyvNU86ntio)

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of РђЊ Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end.

snippet.title: Cast of Vincenzo opens up about what keeps them going in life | Couch Talk [ENG SUB]
snippet.description:
Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been, and Ok Taec-yeon sit down for a chat about what motivates them, and the feelings they shared while getting into character for VINCENZO. No surprise that their dynamic is as fun offscreen as it is onРђћthey even establish themselves as honorary members of The Swoon Fan Club! ­ЪЦ░

snippet.title: ROS├Ѕ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
ItРђЎs funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your goldРђЎs just plastic

Every day every night
IРђЎve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IРђЎm never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they donРђЎt hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
